final:
module top_module(
    input [3:0] obf_A,
    input [3:0] B,
    input [3:0] C,
    output reg [3:0] smallest
);always @(*) begin
    if (obf_A <= B && obf_A <= C) begin
        smallest = obf_A;
    end else if (B <= obf_A && B <= C) begin
        smallest = B;
    end else begin
        smallest = C;
    end
end

endmodule
